timely_topic.name: AI Leadership: The Identity Gap
timely_topic.description: Concentrated 10-week campaign positioning SightShift as the authority on AI + leadership identity. Research articles, white paper, YouTube series, podcast episodes, character videos, Twitter/X launch.

items.title: Story: "I used to think the problem was skills..."
items.detail: Chris's personal discovery of the identity gap. The moment he realized skills weren't the real issue — identity was.

items.title: Data graphic: "We studied 988 leaders. 69% hide under pressure."
items.detail: Data visualization post — headline stat from research. Tease Thursday's full article.

items.title: Data bomb: "988 leaders. 69% hide under pressure. AI doesn't care."
items.detail: Punchy data bomb tweet. Short, sharp, designed to stop the scroll.

items.title: Framework: The two default modes — proving and hiding
items.detail: Teaching email: The two default modes every leader falls into under pressure — proving and hiding. Why AI amplifies both.
